title: [FIRRTL] Replace add/sub with addw/subw if MSB is discarded
body:
In the case where the result of `add` or `sub` immediately throws away the expanded MSB, replace the operation with a non-expanding operator `addw` or `subw` respectively. This usually happens as in the following:
```plain
tail(add, 1) -> addw
tail(sub, 1) -> subw
bits(add, N, 0) -> addw
bits(sub, N, 0) -> subw
```
